examples: This ancient sign includes the Caduceus, the double snake, which dates this depiction of Ophiuchus.
While probably originating in Mesopotamia, the caduceus found its way eastward to India and westward into the Mediterranean.
Unfortunately, although both the staff of aesculapius and the caduceus are in use, only one of them has a historical connection with the practice of medicine.
Keenan and his label Caduceus Cellars brought some star power to Arizona wine making.
Professionally, at least, Scrushy and Andrews have for years been as intertwined as a pair of snakes on a caduceus.
